{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323015147C6104BAF07BA5949EC01"}"},"total":2387},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7427540886751626046","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好的书，克系相关的知识，高纬度的强大与神秘，人类自身的不屈与渺小……时刻提醒着我们要认清自己的定位，不要做超出自身能力范围的事情。也有热血和爽的地方，敢于对高纬放狂言，敢于直面高纬并试图击杀……主角也是理智的，同时又有着正常的情绪波动，配角都很鲜明。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729364107,"group_id":"7358402151829228606","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"三角洲ID不背刺的乖巧鼠，欢迎加好友一起跑刀","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+bSfDtPbrawXuigRQKJ73/7/G2XAatnL3RsMEHTzpxB","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/55117bb6c2f34f79a2352e4264374a42~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790506&x-signature=ZO%2BXZ51gSd3Hys%2F7Iz3TpbSLmoI%3D","user_id":"2101890929660887","user_name":"流离之影"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2101890929660887","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1748269405,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFFFFF","can_worn":false,"id":17,"name":"击穿次元","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47c082300352c1a9e6e7669d207df6fb","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/57235e9992067573933a8f743e5f9044"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7358402151829228606","book_info":{"abstract":"【克苏鲁风+异常收容+异能+神秘+诡异】
三百多年前人类收到了来自高维世界的“先驱者镀金铝板”，并根据象形文字，将其暂译为——訷諻箓。
同时。
全球升维，人类进化。
人类破译出了，訷諻箓中记载的，来自更高维度的诡秘存在。
并意识到，高维的入侵，早在訷諻箓到来之前，边已经开始了……
诡秘降临，高维入侵。
逻辑紊乱，文明停滞。
一群拥有特殊能力的升维之人，在太阳彻底落下之前，于黄昏中前行。
区区吞江饮海的庞然巨兽。
区区腐脓黑血的百眼肉山。
区区铺天盖地的丧尸狂潮。
区区稀奇古怪的乱七八糟。
一切的恐惧……真的都源于火力不足吗？
存在余光的即视。
游弋识海的恐惧。
盘踞梦乡的诡异。
口中传颂的神祇。
你枪里的子弹……打得中你脑海中的那个怪物吗？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ac1ae8e9c6a30c8b1df97eb6dd62741d","author":"清川不改","author_id":"","book_id":"7358402151829228606","book_name":"我的左眼是旧日","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7358471505199514174","read_count":"32815","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1601187"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"783","tags":"都市高武,都市,都市异能,克苏鲁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/724888f588ada29108a7854253f21066~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779385907&x-signature=L73flfNgfZA1ocUxyRFfUZEdT5c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2113696086631927","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"173"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323015147C6104BAF07BA5949EC01"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24725,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":26408},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7404453825792852760","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书十分好看，绝对没的说，之前看的时候才7分现在已经上9了，绝对没的说，200章，我一天就看完了，情节有趣，主角就和诡秘之主的克莱恩一样，有自己的小算计，但不是全知，伏笔🈶，很严谨，人物刻画的也鲜明，就和斩神和异兽一样，但不夸张，比较吸引人，有魔性鹅还有宠物花花相伴，真的就非常有趣，绝对值得一看。看了20多本克苏鲁，有一说一绝对不下于道诡异仙和361诡异修仙","text_exts":[{"e":160,"s":157,"text":"克苏鲁","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742019075949EC01%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227404453825792852760%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227358402151829228606%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":182,"s":178,"text":"诡异修仙","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%AF%A1%E5%BC%82%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742019075949EC01%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227404453825792852760%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227358402151829228606%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%AF%A1%E5%BC%82%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723986876,"group_id":"7358402151829228606","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我叫生物，我们保护，我们收容","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9EIzbggpi08CIj4EwaxkObz20Qayp+d4amPdJIj8WSN","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ab331f1331de457ea270222fcd4d1bcd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789853&x-signature=xa8zX8cJYNR8IO9BO1cJn82Dtxg%3D","user_id":"2787 279849278","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是纯纯克系文，只看开头就能发掘八分浓郁的正统洛式恐怖,看过原著的会喜欢得不了，没看过的可能会有些看不懂
上上次让我感受到住行难安的作品，还是洛夫克拉夫特的《暗夜呢喃》，上一次则是他的《墙中之鼠》，我一辈子也忘不了那种读书过程中的窥视感，绝望感和渺小感——这便是克系恐怖，这便是洛式恐怖，很难想象番茄上居然会有这种水平的克系文出现。
唯一的期望便是后期能有个《穿越银匙之门》中那样面见原型似的宏大结尾"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742667896,"group_id":"7358402151829228606","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"可以称我为O5-0,我对很多小圈子都持狂热态度","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5AwS/XC8daIO2lSUXh5qfRSa/I7SKADeF0O0H+V2LZ5","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8fa1f99ab8cc4d9eb510539bb7cc8b06~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789916&x-signature=MnsSiXGf0zR%2BS7h09yi0GS2Y7Pw%3D","user_id":"4072219582412333","user_name":"拉莱耶的观星者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4072219582412333","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1661582395,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7358402151829228606","book_info":{"abstract":"【克苏鲁风+异常收容+异能+神秘+诡异】
